SEARCH
Package org.praxisplatform.uischema.options.service

Interface OptionSourceProvider

All Known Implementing Classes:
JpaOptionSourceProvider
public interface OptionSourceProvider
Supported host extension point for option-source execution.

Implement this SPI when a host needs to serve a public Praxis option source from a backend that is not the starter's default JPA path, such as an external catalog, registered query, table function, remote service, or another host-specific lookup mechanism. The public contract remains the canonical Praxis endpoint and x-ui.optionSource; private execution details stay inside the host provider.

Providers are resolved after Praxis validates public request semantics such as search policy, page size, includeIds, structured filters, capabilities, dependencies and sort. Host providers may use OptionSourceExecutionRequest.sortKey() and the already validated Pageable, but must not publish SQL, datasource, package, bind parameters, provider names, or context attributes through schemas, OpenAPI, errors, or OptionDTO.extra.

For byIds(OptionSourceExecutionRequest), providers should return concrete OptionDTO instances for found ids and omit ids that were not found. The canonical executor also normalizes provider output before publishing the HTTP response, removing null items and options without ids.
